query: SELECT id, username, name FROM users WHERE name = 'Test Owner Updated' OR username LIKE '%test%owner%'; SELECT userid, COUNT(*) as count FROM vehicles WHERE userid IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name = 'Test Owner Updated' OR username LIKE '%test%owner%') GROUP BY userid;
